steps.title: Identify the sampled group
steps.content: The survey used a random sample of biology professors from Texas public universities. A survey can be generalized to the population from which its random sample was selected.

steps.title: Choose the matching population
steps.content: The sample was not taken from all professors or from all biology professors in the United States. It was taken from biology professors at Texas public universities, so that is the largest supported population. The answer is C.
